meta.title: ncad Learn - Engineering Reference
meta.description: Product-neutral 4-level taxonomy (subject -> topic -> sub-topic -> concept) for the general engineering reference. Each concept teaches the field to professional depth regardless of ncad's status, carries an honest 'In ncad' box, and cites authoritative sources. Structure is comprehensive and non-duplicated: shared math lives in Foundations (S0), shared file formats in Interchange (S8). See docs/documentation-design.md (v2) for the design, the node schema (8a), and the citation model (8b).
meta.note: Comprehensive: subjects, topics, sub-topics AND concepts are complete - every concept of each field is listed. Each concept node carries an 'ncad' status block and at least one authoritative source anchor (a verified canonical textbook/standard/official-doc for its subject; per-concept page/DOI locators and MDX bodies are filled at authoring time). Sources are real, verified anchors - never fabricated per-concept citations.

pcb.title: IPC-2221 Generic Standard on Printed Board Design

subjects.title: Foundations: Math, Geometry & Numerics for CAx
subjects.summary: The shared mathematical substrate cited by every other subject: frames and transforms, linear algebra, curves and continuity, screw theory, numerical methods, and the units/tolerance/determinism model. Written once here to avoid duplication.

topics.title: Coordinate Systems & Transforms
topics.summary: Frames, homogeneous coordinates, rotation representations, and rigid-body transforms.

math.caption: The defining conditions of a rotation matrix

ncad.notes: Rotation matrices act on geometry in the kernel; other rotation forms lower to them.

math.tex: q = w + x\,i + y\,j + z\,k,\quad \lVert q \rVert = 1
math.caption: A unit quaternion encoding a 3D rotation

ncad.notes: Used internally for orientation in transforms and assembly placement.
Assembly placement, connector/mate frames, and feature coordinate systems are homogeneous-matrix compositions.

topics.title: Linear Algebra for Geometry
topics.summary: Vector operations, matrix decompositions, least-squares, and sparse systems as used across modeling and analysis.

topics.title: Curves, Parameterization & Continuity
topics.summary: Parametric vs implicit forms, parametric (C-n) vs geometric (G-n) continuity, curvature and torsion.

topics.title: Screw Theory & Spatial Algebra
topics.summary: Twists, wrenches, Plücker coordinates, the exponential/log map on SE(3), and spatial 6-vectors - the shared language of kinematics, MBD and robotics.

topics.title: Numerical Methods
topics.summary: Root finding, ODE integration, linear solvers, and optimization used by solvers and simulators.

ncad.notes: The root-finding core beneath sketch, assembly, and mechanism solves.

topics.title: Units, Tolerances, Floating Point & Determinism
topics.summary: Unit systems, machine epsilon, exact vs approximate representation, and reproducibility - the basis of ncad's determinism guarantee.

ncad.notes: ncad builds exact B-rep (OCCT) and tessellates only for the viewer.

subjects.title: Geometric & Solid Modeling (CAD)
subjects.summary: How 3D parts are represented, sketched, featured, referenced, assembled, documented, and specialized into domain profiles. ncad's home turf.

topics.title: Geometric Representations
topics.summary: The data models for 3D shape: boundary representation, CSG, mesh, implicit, and convergent.

ncad.notes: B-rep via OCCT; Euler ops are kernel-internal, not authored in ncad.
BRepMesh tessellation to glTF for the viewer.

topics.title: Curves & Surfaces
topics.summary: The analytic and free-form geometry underlying every feature.

math.tex: C(u) = \frac{\sum_{i} N_{i,p}(u)\, w_i\, P_i}{\sum_{i} N_{i,p}(u)\, w_i}
math.caption: A NURBS curve

topics.title: Sketching & 2D Constraints
topics.summary: 2D profiles and the constraint solver that fixes them - the parametric foundation of a feature-based part.

ncad.notes: bezier + interpolated; points solved, curve derived (bucket 2.3.5).
sketch status surfaced in the viewer (bucket 1.5).
construction entities pinned, excluded from the wire.

concepts.title: Project & Offset Prior Edges into a Sketch

ncad.notes: project prior feature edges; offset entities (bucket 1.4).

topics.title: Feature-Based & Parametric Modeling
topics.summary: The ordered feature tree and its replay - the default parametric modeling paradigm.

ncad.notes: pure build(document); incremental rebuild + content-addressed cache.
angle/symmetric/thin; axis X/Y/Z or point+dir (datum-axis Planned).
single-path + helix + variable-section; guide curves approximate a plain sweep.
multi-section, ruled/smooth, point caps; guide/rail curves Planned.
distance, two-distance, distance-angle; vertex chamfer Planned.
uniform wall + face openings; multi-thickness Planned.
counterbore/countersink/ISO sizing/cosmetic thread; modeled thread + full ANSI Planned.
text/sketch onto a flat face; curved-surface wrap Planned.
sandboxed function registry; logic in code, data in the document.

topics.title: The Topological Naming Problem
topics.summary: How to name geometry so references survive upstream edits - the keystone of history-based CAD.

topics.title: Direct / Synchronous Modeling
topics.summary: History-free edits that transform the current B-rep in place.

ncad.notes: non-tangent faces; detect tangency and refuse (Phase 4.2).
commercial kernel + D-Cubed class of system; excluded (design 19).
ncad import + direct-edit within the measured envelope.

topics.title: Boolean & Body Operations
topics.summary: Union/subtract/intersect, multibody management, and boolean robustness.

topics.title: Assemblies
topics.summary: Instances of parts plus constraints and joints.

ncad.notes: four-state status attributed by mate id (bucket 5.3).

topics.title: Surfacing & Freeform (Class A)
topics.summary: Surfaces and curves as primary geometry, continuity matching, and quality analysis.

ncad.notes: G2 engineering subset planned (Phase 9); G2 is OCCT's ceiling.
G3/fairing/reflection is effectively commercial; out of scope on OCCT (design 19).

topics.title: Domain Profiles
topics.summary: Specialized part kinds as feature vocabularies over the shared substrate.

ncad.notes: Phase 11; high-level schema lowers to sweep+boolean.

Phase 11; standard sections swept along a member skeleton.
Phase 11; trimmed joints, plates, footings, rebar.
analytical line/node model feeds frame3dd/PyNite (the FEA line).

topics.title: Drafting & Documentation (2D)
topics.summary: Associative engineering drawings derived from the model.

topics.title: PMI / GD&T
topics.summary: Semantic 3D annotation and tolerance analysis.

ncad.notes: owned analysis (geometric, no external engine); Phase 8.

topics.title: Mass Properties & Measurement
topics.summary: Volume, centre of gravity, inertia, and measurement queries.

ncad.notes: from BRepGProp on the exact solid.

subjects.title: Manufacturing & CAM
subjects.summary: Turning a finished solid into machine instructions: processes, setups, toolpath strategies, simulation, and G-code. A process layer over the solid substrate. ncad's CAM seam is Phase 15 (2.5D + drilling native on OCCT sections + Clipper2; opencamlib as the optional 3D plugin; 5-axis out of scope).

topics.title: Manufacturing Processes Overview
topics.summary: The manufacturing landscape a CAM system targets.

ncad.notes: CAM = a process profile over the built solid (Phase 15).
fixtures as bodies for collision (reuses motion interference).

topics.title: CNC Machining Fundamentals
topics.summary: Setups, tools, and cutting mechanics common to all strategies.

ncad.notes: tool library as a registered resource (Phase 15.1).

topics.title: Toolpath Strategies
topics.summary: The catalogue of milling and turning strategies.

ncad.notes: long-horizon; 5-axis has no credible OSS kernel.
explicitly out of scope; reserved for a future external-kernel plugin.

topics.title: Toolpath Geometry & Algorithms
topics.summary: The computational geometry behind toolpaths.

ncad.notes: own the strategy logic on Clipper2/pyclipr.

topics.title: Simulation & Verification
topics.summary: Proving out the program before it cuts metal.

ncad.notes: material-removed BOM/mass delta via boolean stock sim.

topics.title: Post-Processing & G-code
topics.summary: Strategy-neutral toolpaths to machine-specific code.

ncad.notes: post registry; one in-house generic 3-axis post, pluggable dialects.

topics.title: Additive Manufacturing
topics.summary: Layer-based fabrication and its toolpaths.

topics.title: Fabrication Outputs
topics.summary: 2D and nested outputs for cutting.

subjects.title: Electronic Design (PCB / ECAD)
subjects.summary: The board data model whose primary truth is electrical (nets/layers/footprints) and whose physical shape lowers to solids. ncad owns the data model + geometric DRC + 3D lowering (Phase 16); delegates schematic capture, routing, autoplacement, physics DRC and fab output to KiCad via a .kicad_pcb round-trip.

topics.title: Electronics Design Flow
topics.summary: The path from idea to fabricated board.

ncad.notes: numbered net table in the pcb block (Phase 16).

topics.title: Board Data Model
topics.summary: The physical board's structured data - ncad's owned model.

ncad.notes: layer stackup in the pcb block (Phase 16.1).
autorouting delegated to KiCad; ncad ingests routed geometry.
zone fills as authored input or one pinned deterministic fill (determinism hazard).

topics.title: Design Rules & Checks
topics.summary: Geometric and electrical verification.

sources.title: IPC-2221 Generic Standard on Printed Board Design

topics.title: Signal & Power Integrity (Concepts)
topics.summary: The electrical physics - taught in full, not solved by ncad.

ncad.notes: physics DRC delegated; ncad does geometric DRC only.

topics.title: ECAD-MCAD Collaboration
topics.summary: Where the board meets the mechanical world - ncad's home turf.

concepts.title: Outline, Cutouts & Copper as Thin Solids

topics.title: Fabrication & Assembly Outputs
topics.summary: The files a fab house consumes.

ncad.notes: fab output delegated to KiCad via .kicad_pcb round-trip; Gerber/ODB++/IPC-2581 as plugin converters.
STEP AP214 for the mechanical side (AP242's electrical scope is wire-harness).

subjects.title: Kinematics & Mechanisms
subjects.summary: Geometry-driven motion of mechanisms: mobility, position/velocity/acceleration analysis, mechanism families, and motion synthesis. ncad solves this with py-slvs stepped over time (Phase 6).

topics.title: Kinematic Fundamentals
topics.summary: Rigid-body motion, mobility, joints, and chains.

topics.title: Position, Velocity & Acceleration Analysis
topics.summary: Loop closure and the kinematic Jacobian.

topics.title: Planar Mechanisms
topics.summary: The classic linkages and motion converters.

concepts.title: Involute Gears & the Fundamental Law of Gearing

topics.title: Spatial Mechanisms
topics.summary: 3D linkages and constant-velocity joints.

topics.title: Forward & Inverse Kinematics (Mechanism-Level)
topics.summary: Workspace, reachability, and singularities.

concepts.title: Driving an Output Frame; Solution Branches

topics.title: Motion Synthesis & Analysis
topics.summary: Generating motion and its traces/envelopes.

subjects.title: Multibody Dynamics (MBD)
subjects.summary: Force-driven motion of rigid-body systems: equations of motion, constrained systems, efficient algorithms, and integration. ncad's bounded rigid-body MBD is delegated to Ondsel (Phase 14).

topics.title: Rigid-Body Dynamics Foundations
topics.summary: Newton-Euler, inertia, momentum, energy.

ncad.notes: mass/inertia from BRepGProp feed the MBD solver.

topics.title: Equations-of-Motion Formulations
topics.summary: The alternative ways to derive the equations of motion.

topics.title: Constrained Multibody Systems
topics.summary: Constraints, DAEs, and reaction forces.

ncad.notes: reaction forces are the point of the MBD escalation over kinematics.

topics.title: Efficient Dynamics Algorithms
topics.summary: The recursive spatial-vector algorithms.

topics.title: Numerical Integration for MBD
topics.summary: Stiff systems, event and contact handling.

topics.title: Forces & Force Elements
topics.summary: Gravity, springs/dampers, actuators, bounded contact.

ncad.notes: line drawn at SIMPLE contact; friction-rich/continuous contact is out (design 19).

topics.title: Flexible Multibody (Concept)
topics.summary: Deformable bodies - taught, out of scope for solving.

subjects.title: Robotics & Physics-Engine Simulation
subjects.summary: Robot kinematics, dynamics, planning, control, and contact-rich physics simulation. ncad adopts MuJoCo as a first-class robotics backend (Phase 17): ncad owns the robot model (links/joints/inertias/actuators/collision), lowers it to MJCF/URDF, and delegates the physics solve.

topics.title: Robot Kinematics
topics.summary: FK/IK, DH parameters, product-of-exponentials, the manipulator Jacobian.

topics.title: Robot Types & Structures
topics.summary: Serial, parallel, mobile, legged, end-effectors.

topics.title: Robot Dynamics
topics.summary: Manipulator EoM and contact.

topics.title: Motion Planning & Trajectory
topics.summary: Trajectory generation and path planning.

topics.title: Control
topics.summary: PID, computed-torque, impedance, operational-space.

topics.title: Physics-Engine Simulation
topics.summary: Contact dynamics, collision, actuators, integrators.

topics.title: MuJoCo (ncad First-Class Backend)
topics.summary: The model format and simulation engine ncad lowers robots to.

ncad.notes: Phase 17: lower the ncad robot model to MJCF.

topics.title: Robot Description & Interop
topics.summary: URDF, SDF, and round-trip.

concepts.title: MJCF vs URDF vs SDF Trade-offs & Round-Trip

topics.title: Learning & Control Hooks
topics.summary: RL environments, sim-to-real, system identification.

ncad.notes: ncad supplies the environment, not the policy.

subjects.title: Engineering Analysis & Simulation (CAE)
subjects.summary: Field-physics analysis: FEM/FVM discretization, structural/thermal FEA, CFD, 1D frame, hydraulics, and fluid power. ncad owns the model (geometry/mesh/BCs/analytical abstraction) and delegates every field solve to a mature open engine; it never writes a field solver.

topics.title: Analysis Fundamentals
topics.summary: Continuum mechanics, governing PDEs, BCs, V&V, and the owned-vs-delegated principle.

concepts.title: Dirichlet, Neumann & Robin Conditions; Loads & Restraints

ncad.notes: ncad owns geometry+mesh+BCs; the solve runs in an external open engine (Phase 13).

topics.title: Discretization Methods
topics.summary: FEM/FVM/FDM/BEM and meshing.

concepts.title: Finite Element Method (Weak Form, Shape Functions, Assembly)

math.tex: \int_\Omega \nabla v \cdot \nabla u \, d\Omega = \int_\Omega v\, f \, d\Omega
math.caption: The weak form of a Poisson problem

concepts.title: Finite Volume, Finite Difference & Boundary Element Methods

ncad.notes: ncad meshes via Gmsh for the export deck.

topics.title: Structural FEA
topics.summary: Linear static, modal, buckling, nonlinear, transient.

topics.title: Thermal Analysis
topics.summary: Conduction, convection, radiation, coupling.

topics.title: 1D Frame / Beam Structural
topics.summary: Beam theory and the direct stiffness method - fed by the structural profile's analytical model.

topics.title: Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD)
topics.summary: Navier-Stokes, turbulence, conjugate heat transfer.

topics.title: Pipe-Network / Hydraulics
topics.summary: Head loss and network solution - fed by the piping profile.

topics.title: Fluid Power / 1D System Simulation
topics.summary: Lumped-parameter hydraulic/pneumatic circuits that can drive motion.

ncad.notes: OpenModelica; can drive motion (Phase 6) as a driver source.

topics.title: Solver Workflow & ncad's Seam
topics.summary: Model ownership, deck generation, result read-back.

ncad.notes: ncad owns the model + writes each engine's input deck; the solve runs outside ncad, results read back for display.

subjects.title: Interchange, Standards & Data Exchange
subjects.summary: The file formats and standards that move models between tools. A shared home so each format is documented once and cross-linked from its domain.
